_comment: POPULATION CELLS (docs/design/POPULATION_WAR.md Â§3.1): desired population by zone_tag, folded ADDITIVELY onto ProtoPopulation's code floor via ensure_targets() (same spine pattern as ProtoNPC.ensure_archetypes/ensure_prices â€” a JSON row here adds/overrides a zone_tag's desired mix with no code). Groups: civilian/worker/threat/law/faction_troops (the owner-named five). 'defaults' holds every timer/fraction knob so nothing is hardcoded in population.gd â€” WAR_AI_RESEARCH.md Â§1.2's PZ timers, converted to OUR 24-minute in-game day (see comments per knob).

defaults._refill_unseen_hours_comment: POPULATION_WAR.md Â§3.1 rule 2 / Â§4 formula worked example: 2.0 game-clock hours before a cleared cell is eligible to refill again. (PZ's RespawnUnseenHours default is 16 REAL hours over a much larger world; POPULATION_WAR.md's own formula example uses 2.0 for our compressed cell grid, not a straight unit port â€” see report.)
defaults._refill_step_comment: POPULATION_WAR.md Â§3.1: 'a cell's group G refills by +1 (never a burst)' and Â§8 acceptance: 'not a burst to full desired population in one tick'. This is a LITERAL COUNT per eligible unseen-cycle, not PZ's 10%-of-desired fractional RespawnMultiplier (which rounds to 0 forever at our small desired_pop values, e.g. floor(0.1*3)=0) â€” POPULATION_WAR.md's own rule text and acceptance criteria are the authority here.
